hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.ar:
262   -  وَّ كَّان َّ إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ي َّطْلِى  إ ِن ْطَّي ْهِ ق ِى  إَّلْحَّم َّامِ وَّ ي َّق ُّول 
ي ُّص ْعِف ُّ إَّلْن َّصَّزَّ .
hadiths.en:
The Messenger of Allah {saws} said: "Shave the abdomen hair for both males and 
females." (And in another version, it includes armpit hair).  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 59 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 261

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
And Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al -Sadiq {a.s} would rub Nuura (depilatory 
paste) to his armpits in the bathhouse and say: 'Plucking the armpit hair weakens the 
shoulders and diminishes (weakens) the eyesight.'" 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 619 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 138

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 262

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٦٢

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al -Sadiq {a.s} said: "Shaving (unwanted hair) is 
better than plucking them and using Nuura (depilatory paste) is better than shaving 
them."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 60 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 619 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 138 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 263

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٦٣

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.ar:
265  -  وَّق َّال رَّسُّولُّ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ :  «
ن ِهِ.  
وإلح ن ث  لأ ن ا س ن ا ن  ي طلى  ق ا ن  إلن ورة  ي ز ي ذة ن ط اق ه .
hadiths.en:
Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib {a.s} said: "Removing armpit hair eliminates unpleasant 
odors and is a means of purification and a practice (Sunnah) that was commanded by 
the Good and Pure Prophet {saws}."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 136 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 264
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.location: Volume 1 › THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٦٤

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
The Messenger of Allah {saws} said: 'None of you should allow the hair under his 
armpits to grow long, for the devil takes it as a shield to hide behind.'  
[AL SADUQ] 
And it is permissible for the one in a state of major impurity to apply it, as the Nuura 
(depilatory paste) increases cleanliness.  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 619

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 265
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.location: Volume 1 › THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٦٥

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said:  
"The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib {a.s} said:  
‘A man should avoid the use of Nuura (depilatory paste) on Wednesday, for it is a day 
of continuous ill -omen, but otherwise the use of Nuura is permissible on all other 
days.’" 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Al -Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 623 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 80 • 
Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 7, p. 367 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 266
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.location: Volume 1 › THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٦٦

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.ar:
268  -  وَّ رَّوَّى إَّلز َّي  َّان ُّ ن ْن ُّ إَّلص َّلْث ِ عَّم َّن ْ إ َّج ْن َّزَّةُّ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  إَّلْحَّسَّن ِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّال -  «
إَّلْن َّزَّضُّ ق َّلاَّ ي َّلُّومَّن  َّ إ ِلأ َّ ن َّق ْسَّه . 
ولأ ن اس ن ا ن  ي ي ذلك  إلزج ل ق ى  إلحمام ن السوي ق  وإلذق ي ق  وإلن ح اله ، ولأ ن ا س ن ا ن  ي ي ذلك  ن الذق ي ق  إلملي وب  ن الز ي ث ، ولي س ق ي ما 
ي ن ق غ إلن ذن  إ سزإف ، إ ن ما إلأسزإف  ق ي ما إ ي لف  إلمال وإ ص ز ن الن ذن .
hadiths.en:
(Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Farisi Al-Fattal narrates from Messenger of Allah {saws} ):  
“Applying Nuura (depilatory paste) on Jumu’ah, it is said that it can lead to leprosy."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 267

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٦٧

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Al-Rayyan ibn Al -Salt narrated from someone, who narrated from Abu Al -
Hasan, Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim {a.s}, said:  
"Whoever puts on Nuura (depilatory paste) on Jumu’ah and is afflicted with leprosy, 
let him blame no one but himself." 
[AL SADUQ] 
It is permissible for a man to use flour -based mixtures, oil -based pastes, or other 
natural exfoliants for personal care in the hammam (public bathhouse).  
There is no overindulgence in what benefits the body; rather, overindulgence lies in 
what wastes money and harms the body.  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 62 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 623 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 7, p. 367 • Bihar Al Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 92

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 268

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٦٨

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
The Messenger of Allah {saws} said:  
"Whoever applies depilatory substances (to remove body hair) and dyes with henna, 
Allah {SWT}, the Most High, protects him from three things: leprosy, vitiligo (a skin 
disorder), and ‘al -ākilah’ (a type of skin disease or severe wound infection) until the 
next time he applies it." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol. 1 • Thawab al -A’mal wa Iqab al -A’mal, Part 1, p. 21 • 
Makarim Al-Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 62 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 62 • Awaali al-La’aali, Part 4, p. 14 • Al-Wafi, 
Vol. 6, p. 628 • Wasa’il Al-Shia, vol. 2, p. 73 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 74 • Bihar Al Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 90 • 
Bihar Al Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 92 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 269
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.location: Volume 1 › THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٦٩

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said: "Applying henna after the use of 
Nuura (depilatory paste) is a protection against leprosy and vitiligo."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 62 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 628 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 74 • Bihar Al Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 92 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 270
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٧٠

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
It is narrated (from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah) that he narrates:  
"Whoever applies a depilatory substance and massages himself with henna from head 
to toe, Allah {SWT} removes poverty from him." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 74 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 271
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.location: Volume 1 › THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٧١

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
The Messenger of Allah {saws} said: "Dye with henna, for it improves eyesight, 
promotes hair growth, gives a pleasant fragrance, and calms the wife”.  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Al-Kafi, Volume 6, p. 483 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 
78 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 640 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 95 • Bihar Al Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 99

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 272
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.location: Volume 1 › THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٧٢

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al -Sadiq {a.s} said: "Henna removes the odors, 
increases radiance in the face, improves breath, and beautifies one's offspring."  
[AL SADUQ] 
There is no issue if a man applies perfumed ointment in the bathhouse and rubs his 
hand with it to treat cracks, but it is not recommended to make it a habit or for the 
effect to be seen on him consistently. 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Al-Kafi, Volume 6, p. 484 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 
78 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 641 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 95 • Bihar Al Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 99 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 273
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.location: Volume 1 › THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٧٣

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib {a.s} said:  
"Dyeing (the hair or beard) is the tradition of Muhammad {saws} and it is part of the 
Sunnah." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 78 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 643 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 83 • Bihar Al Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 99 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 274

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.ar:
276  -  وَّ ذَّج َّلَّ إَّلْحَّسَّن ُّ ن ْن ُّ إَّلْح َّهْمِ عَّلَّى إ َّن ِى  إَّلْحَّسَّن ِ مُّوسَّى ن ْن ِ ج َّعْق َّزٍ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ : وَّ ق َّذِ إِج ْي َّص َّث َّ ن ِالس َّوَّإذِ ق َّق َّالَّ  
« وَّ لَّق َّذْ ي َّزَّكَّث ْ ن ِسَّاء  إَّلْعِق  َّه 
ن ِي َّزْك ِ إ َّر ْوَّإج ِهِن  َّ إَّلي  َّهْي ِن َّه لَّهُّ ن َّلَّع َّن َّا إ َّن  َّ إَّلْحِن  َّاءَّ ي َّز ِي ذُّ ق ِى  إَّلس  َّي ْث ِ ق َّق َّال 
ي َّز ِي ذُّ ق ِى  كُّلِّ ي َّوْمٍ
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said:  
"There is no harm in any kind of dyeing." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 78 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 644 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 77 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 83 • Bihar Al Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 99 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 275

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Al-Hasan ibn al -Jahm entered upon Abu Al -Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al -
Kadhim {a.s} who had dyed his hair with black dye.  
Imam {a.s} said: "Indeed, there is a reward in dyeing.  
Dyeing and grooming are among those things which increase the chastity of women, 
and some women have abandoned chastity because their husbands have neglected 
grooming themselves."  
(ibn Al-Jahm) replied to Him: "We have heard that henna increases grey hair?”  
Imam {a.s} said: “What increases grey hair? Grey hair increases every day."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 276

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٧٦

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Muhammad ibn Muslim asked Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al -Baqir {a.s} about 
dyeing the hair, and He said:  
"The Messenger of Allah {saws} used to dye, and we still have some of his hair with us."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol. 1 • Makarim Al -Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 84 • Bihar Al -Anwar, Vol. 
73, p. 103 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 277
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.location: Volume 1 › THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٧٧

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
It is reported that The Prophet {saws} had seventeen gray hairs in his head and 
beard. 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 278
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.location: Volume 1 › THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٢٧٨

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
The Prophet, Imam Hussain ibn Ali {a.s} and Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al -Baqir 
{a.s} used to dye their hair with katam (a plant-based dye often used in combination with 
henna to produce a darker color). 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 122 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 
6, p. 644 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 92

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 279

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
And Imam Ali ibn Al -Hussain {a.s} used to dye his hair with both henna and Al -
Katam (plant-based black)." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 280
